title: calm4.ogg ONLY
description: Replaces almost all music in the game with Notch's calm4.ogg
body:
### This is a resource pack for Minecraft 1.21 or 1.21.1 that actually works. It replaces almost **ALL MUSIC** with calm4.ogg by Markus Persson (Notch). 

Excludes:
- The Nether
- Creative
- The End
- Any game specific music?? (caves and or biomes)
